unit.note: server vitest 155 files / 1843 tests green (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local); tsc --noEmit clean. Includes the 27 independent RED-first guards (author!=fixer): real-ConPTY teardown, F05 clear-fence, F01 ordering, suspended-flush resurrection race. Client suite unaffected (server-only diff; no client/** file changed).

integration.note: 27 independent must-not-modify guards, each proven RED on pre-fix main then GREEN: real-ConPTY delete-with-secret teardown (route->ptyManager->snapshotStore->disk/process), project-delete cascade, snapshot clear-fence, bounded-kill, tombstone resurrection race.

e2e.note: server-only privacy hardening; no UI-observable behavior change. Real-app proof deferred to batched post-merge :3847 delete-with-secret smoke (Guard 4, orchestrator-run after D05).

surface_verification.justification: Server-only privacy hardening (DELETE /tasks/:id + project-delete cascade tear down the live pty before wiping scrollback/snapshot; SnapshotStore.clear() fences the per-task write queue before unlink). NO UI-observable behavior change: the DELETE HTTP contract and every rendered surface are unchanged; the fix is a disk/process-table side-effect (pty killed, <taskId>.log/.snapshot/.snapshot.tmp-* absent and staying absent, child pid dead) that a browser cannot observe. Behavioral proof = 27 real-ConPTY server integration guards (author!=fixer, RED-on-pre-fix-main then GREEN) + full server suite 1843/1843. Real-app proof = batched post-merge :3847 delete-with-secret smoke (Guard 4), orchestrator-run after D05. Frontend-change detector false-positive: substring 'src/' matches 'server/src/...'; no client/**, .tsx, or .css file changed.

behaviors.behavior: DELETE /tasks/:id tears down the live pty (kill) BEFORE clearing scrollback + snapshot (F01 ordering)
behaviors.evidence: server/src/external/delete-cascade-pty-teardown.test.ts (real ConPTY: pid dead + <taskId>.log/.snapshot/.snapshot.tmp-* absent and stay absent) + server/src/external/tasks/__tests__/routes.test.ts (fake pty: kill-before-clear order) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Project-delete cascade tears down each task pty BEFORE wiping its scrollback/snapshot

SnapshotStore.clear() awaits the per-task write queue (fence) BEFORE unlink, and does not early-return on ENOENT before fencing, so a queued/in-flight flushMirrorSnapshot cannot resurrect the snapshot (F05)
behaviors.evidence: server/src/external/snapshot-clear-fence.test.ts (enqueue slow write -> clear() -> await -> assert file gone) + server/src/terminal/snapshot-store.test.ts PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Bounded kill teardown: a DELETE cannot hang unboundedly on a pathological slow-dying child (review R1 HIGH remediation)
Snapshot-writer tombstone blocks a suspended-flush resurrection race after clear (review R1 MEDIUM remediation)
Single-finalize: sync onExit does not double-run cleanup after an explicit kill (review R1 LOW remediation)
AC3 no-regression: full existing server suite stays green and no ADR/invariant is regressed
behaviors.evidence: server vitest 1843/1843 + tsc --noEmit clean in F0

test_completeness.note: The batched post-merge :3847 delete-with-secret real-app smoke (Guard 4) is an ADDITIONAL real-deployment confirmation of behaviors already tested here by the real-ConPTY integration guard, not a distinct untested behavior; orchestrator-run after D05.
